guidance.repeat_testing_guidance: Minnesota does not recommend every private well be tested for PFAS. Testing depends on whether the well is in an environmental investigation area and on state guidance for accredited-lab sampling.
guidance.benchmark_notes: Minnesota uses MDH health-based guidance values and state investigation context. Third-party results are not the same as state-issued well advisories.

profile.primary_reference_label: Minnesota health-based guidance and federal PFAS context
profile.summary: Minnesota has been revising PFAS health-based guidance and explicitly points to both state risk-assessment work and current federal PFAS drinking-water standards. For Sharp v1, Minnesota should be treated as a state-guidance-first route rather than a simple single-number benchmark state.

benchmarks.label: Federal context currently referenced by Minnesota
benchmarks.note: Use as context only; Minnesota guidance should still be read directly before acting.

profile.private_well_use_note: Minnesota results should be anchored in current MDH guidance and lab context before a household treats a single benchmark line as definitive.

entry_decision_input.summary: No direct well test is available yet, so the engine should route the household to a state-guided lab and sampling workflow before any product comparison.
